_comment: Tier 6.3 Lighthouse budget — ran against built dashboard at 127.0.0.1:3000 on 2026-04-15. Desktop preset. Scores are 0–100. Regression past the floor blocks the commit.
_caveats: best_practices is floored at 90 because the dev dashboard (127.0.0.1:3000) hits api.hedgesparkhq.com which returns CORS errors and blocks a tracker.js script under a strict prod CSP — both are test-environment artifacts that disappear in production. When lighthouse is run against a prod-origin build this floor should be raised.

/install accessibility is floored at 96 because the primary CTA button uses white text on #d4893a amber (3.0:1 contrast, below WCAG AA 4.5:1 for small text). That button style is used in 66 places across 28 files and is founder-territory brand work — do not silently change it. When the brand palette is audited, raise the a11y floor to 100.
